nasb.text: Then Satan went out from the presence of the Lord and smote Job with sore boils from the sole of his foot to the crown of his head.

esv.text: So Satan went out from the presence of the Lord and struck Job with loathsome sores from the sole of his foot to the crown of his head.

cnv.text: 於是撒但從耶和華面前退去，擊打約伯，使他從腳掌到頭頂都生了毒瘡。

ccb.text: 于是，撒旦从耶和华面前退去，开始加害约伯，使他从头到脚长毒疮。
